title: huperzia leitzii
intro: Huperzia leitzii, also known as Chinese club moss or Qian Ceng Ta, is a type of evergreen plant that belongs to the Huperziaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Huperzia leitzii include its ability to improve memory and cognitive function, as well as its potential to protect against neurodegenerative diseases such as Alzheimer's and Parkinson's. Huperzia leitzii can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
